case_title: RANULFO GALEANO VS. TIMOTHY JAMES ROBERT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TIMOTHY JAMES REBBERT, INCORRECTLY SUED AS TIMOTHY JAMES ROBERT, IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS EXPIRED JANUARY 2020. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
